body_html:
Hey Sandra,

Just shooting you this quick email,
we got your request for more catering info,
and our event planner will connect shortly.

❤️ - Comeketo Catering



p.s. check out this quick video to see what's in store when you select our Brazilian BBQ Option













Love & Confetti,

🌺 Rhonna C. Ricafort
Catering Sales Manager

🔥 Eufy/Camila/ Cath
Catering Support
Comeketo Catering
📘Facebook | 📸 Instagram | 🌐 Website
📲 My Direct: (978) 678 3739
📲 Catering Main: (978) 381-1212

body_text:
Hey Sandra,  
  
Just shooting you this quick email,  
we got your request for more catering info,  
and our event planner will connect shortly.

  
❤️ - Comeketo Catering

  

  

  

p.s. check out [this quick video](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/bu7v9ttoaa)
to see what's in store when you select our Brazilian BBQ Option

  

  

  

  

  

  

  

[![email_photo.jpeg](cid:2c29-00e4-b267)](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/bu7v9ttoaa)

  

  

  

  

  

  

Love & Confetti,

  

**🌺 Rhonna C. Ricafort**  
Catering Sales Manager

Catering Support  
**Comeketo Catering**

📲 Catering Main: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)
